Personality Traits

Aizen is a very nerdy bunny girl. She is always there for a friend and will respect you for who you are! She is exceptional in her studies, but not so good at science. She likes to learn, go for mindful walks, play video games, draw, and talk. YAPYAPYAP!

Body Type

Aizen is a fluffy bunny girl with a feminine build. She is 167cm, so liek..5’6 for the cheeseburger guys. She wears a hoodie and some volleyball shorts, since she’s on the state team.
